acceptance_targets: [CH12_PROSE_01] PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:201-202 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:310 read as either Noreen-observable description or clearly signaled POV transition; FAIL if Elsie's private thoughts remain directly asserted with no transition cue.

[CH12_PROSE_02] PASS if no more than two instances of the exact 'had gone + adjective' construction remain across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:3,225,261,280 and revised lines show distinct sensory/action rendering; FAIL if three or more template instances remain in those target lines.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:201-202 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:310 read as either Noreen-observable description or clearly signaled POV transition; FAIL if Elsie's private thoughts remain directly asserted with no transition cue.
findings.problem: Close-third focalization on Noreen loosens into un-signaled access to Elsie's private cognition (task list/arithmetic), creating a POV boundary wobble against the style-bible close-distance requirement.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:201-202 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:310, either convert Elsie's inner-state claims into Noreen-observable cues/inference language or insert an explicit POV shift marker before entering Elsie's interior processing.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than two instances of the exact 'had gone + adjective' construction remain across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:3,225,261,280 and revised lines show distinct sensory/action rendering; FAIL if three or more template instances remain in those target lines.
findings.problem: Recurring construction tic: multiple state changes are delivered with the same 'had gone + adjective' template. At four uses, the pattern starts to flatten prose texture and reads as autopilot phrasing.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise at least two of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:261, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:280 by replacing the template with concrete sensory/action-specific language.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the more specific and potentially uncomfortable rendering if it is character-true and causally necessary. Intimacy, bodily risk, and moral compromise must be shown with concrete detail and aftermath, then integrated into later behavior rather than quarantined as a one-scene shock.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a draft abstracts pain, sex, coercion, blood, or economic shame at the exact moment consequence should be embodied, revise by replacing summary with physically and socially specific action tied to POV stakes.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High by default for spoken lines; uncontracted forms are marked choices for period formality, emphasis, or character-specific control behavior.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate structural engines across adjacent chapters: ensemble social scenes, inventory chapters, information-turn chapters, acted-upon pressure chapters, and aftermath chapters. Vary scene count (2 to 4), dialogue density, and interiority depth so consecutive chapters do not share the same pacing signature.
prose_style_profile.diction: Period-authentic but readable contemporary English, favoring concrete nouns and precise verbs over lyrical abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person, alternating primarily between Elsie and Noreen, with occasional tightly limited deviations only when causal clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Sentence rhythm should alternate compressed pressure bursts with longer observational lines that carry social texture; avoid monotone paragraph cadence.
